name: Landing Page Planner
description: Landing Page Planner - Marketing template for channels professionals
instructions: HOW TO USE THIS PLANNER Step 1: Study Best Practices Start with the Best Practices tab. Review the 50+ conversion principles organised by category. Bookmark the ones most relevant to your industry and audience. These will guide every design and copy decision. Step 2: Choose Your LP Framework Based on your campaign goal, go to the matching framework tab: • Product Sales LP — for e-commerce, product launches, direct sales • Brand Awareness LP — for top-of-funnel, thought leadership, PR • Lead Magnet LP — for gated content, free tools, email capture • Event Registration LP — for webinars, confere

fields.label: Use benefit-driven headlines that answer 'What is in it for me?'
Keep headlines under 10 words for maximum impact
Include a power word: Free, New, Proven, Instant, Guaranteed
Write subheads that expand on the headline promise
Use second person (you/your) to speak directly to the visitor
Break copy into scannable sections with clear subheads
Eliminate jargon — write at an 8th grade reading level
Lead with the problem before presenting your solution
Use contrasting colour for CTA buttons that stands out from page
Write action-oriented CTA text: Get, Start, Download, Join
Place primary CTA above the fold and repeat below
Add urgency or scarcity cues near the CTA when authentic
Use directional cues (arrows, eye gaze) pointing to CTA
Make CTA button large enough to tap on mobile (min 44x44px)
Add micro-copy below CTA to reduce anxiety (No credit card required)
Use hero images or videos that show the product in context
Maintain consistent brand colours and typography throughout
Use white space strategically — do not overcrowd the layout
Ensure visual hierarchy guides the eye from headline to CTA
Use real photos over stock images when possible
Keep page width between 960-1200px for optimal readability
Use icons to break up text and illustrate key benefits
Display customer testimonials with real names and photos
Include trust badges: security seals, certifications, awards
Show customer logos or 'as seen in' media mentions
Add star ratings or review scores near the CTA
Include a money-back guarantee or risk-free trial promise
Show real-time activity: 'X people viewing this right now'
Ask only for essential information — fewer fields = higher conversion

sections.title: Product Sales LP
sections.description: Complete the Product Sales LP section

fields.label: Full-width hero image. Price in large font. CTA button in contrasting colour above the fold.
Short paragraph or 3 bullet points. Icon or illustration of the problem.
Icon + feature name + 1-sentence benefit. Grid layout (2 or 3 columns).
Image carousel or grid. Zoom-on-hover functionality. Include 360-degree view if possible.
3-column layout with icons. Before/after comparison if applicable.
Customer reviews (minimum 3). Star ratings. Number of units sold. User-generated content.
Star rating summary at top. Individual reviews with name, photo, verified badge.
Compare your product vs alternatives or vs 'without this product'. Show clear advantages.
Table format with checkmarks. Your product column highlighted.

sections.title: Brand Awareness LP
sections.description: Complete the Brand Awareness LP section

fields.label: Full-screen hero with cinematic imagery or video background. Large typography. Minimal navigation.
Storytelling format. Statistics or data visualisation to quantify the problem.
Quote-style layout. Brand colours prominent. Founder photo optional.
3-5 core values with real examples of how you live them. Show, do not just tell.
Card layout with icons. Each value gets a short story or proof point.
Large numbers with animated counters. Before/after or growth metrics.
Long-form testimonials or mini case studies. Focus on transformation and emotional journey.
Full-width story sections with customer photos. Video testimonials preferred.
Team photos, office culture, manufacturing process, sourcing stories. Humanise your brand.
Photo gallery or video montage. Candid, authentic imagery preferred.

sections.title: Lead Magnet LP
sections.description: Complete the Lead Magnet LP section

fields.label: Split layout: left side copy, right side form. Form above the fold. 3-5 form fields maximum.
Numbered list or checklist format. Include a mockup or preview image of the deliverable.
Pull quote or stat callout. Partial infographic or chart from the content.
Define the ideal reader: job title, industry, experience level. Help visitors self-qualify.
3 persona cards or a simple checklist: 'This is for you if...'
Author bio with credentials. Company expertise. Number of people who have already downloaded.
Photo + bio. Social proof numbers: '5,000+ marketers downloaded'.
What format: PDF, video, template? How many pages? Time to consume? Is it immediately actionable?
Icon-based list: pages, read time, format. Set expectations clearly.
Testimonials from people who used the lead magnet. Quotes about how it helped them.
1-2 testimonials with photos. Star rating if applicable.

sections.title: Event Registration LP
sections.description: Complete the Event Registration LP section

fields.label: Bold event name. Countdown timer to event date. Register CTA prominent above the fold.
Date, time, duration, format, price (or FREE). All critical info scannable at a glance.
Horizontal bar with icon+text pairs. Sticky on scroll if possible.
Numbered list or timeline format. Each point is actionable and specific.
Speaker cards with photos. Social media links. Credentials highlighted.
Timeline or table format. Session descriptions expandable. Download agenda as PDF option.
Define ideal attendee: role, industry, experience level. Help people self-select.
Persona cards or checklist format. 'This event is for you if...'
Photos/videos from previous events. Attendee testimonials. Previous attendance numbers.
Photo gallery. Video highlight reel. Testimonial carousel.

sections.title: SaaS Service LP
sections.description: Complete the SaaS Service LP section

fields.label: Product screenshot or demo video in the hero. CTA with contrasting colour. No navigation menu.
Embedded video with play button overlay. Autoplay muted option. GIF alternative for fast loading.
Icon + benefit headline + 1-sentence description. Grid or column layout.
3-5 step process showing how easy it is to get started. Reduce perceived complexity.
Numbered steps with icons or screenshots. 'Get started in 3 minutes' messaging.
Compare plans/tiers or compare vs manual processes. Show what is included at each level.
Comparison table with checkmarks. Most popular plan highlighted.
Show compatible tools and platforms. 'Works with tools you already use.'
Logo grid of integration partners. 'And 50+ more' if applicable.
Before/after metrics. Customer logo + quote + result. Industry-specific if possible.

sections.title: AB Test Planner
sections.description: Complete the AB Test Planner section

fields.label: Specific product mention increases relevance and CTR by 15%
Reducing form fields from 4 to 2 will increase conversion by 25%
Adding 'no card' removes friction and lifts signups by 20%
